/opt/rh/devtoolset-7/root/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fopenmp -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0 -shared -Wl,-soname,libfvt_sr_op_bind.so -o ../lib/fvt/libfvt_sr_op_bind.so CMakeFiles/fvt_sr_op_bind.dir/bind/fvt_sr_op_bind.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/data/home/liuhanyu/hyliu/code/rubbish/test/AI2Pot/source/build/lib/fvt:/data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib:/data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib ../lib/fvt/libforce_sr_op.so ../lib/fvt/libvirial_sr_op.so /data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so /data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so /data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/libpython3.9.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed /data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so -lpthread -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed
